Description.description: A single account in an entitys chart of accounts. References rm_accounttype, rm_accountcategory, rm_entity. Supports a self-referencing parent for hierarchical COA.
Unique identifier of the user who created the record.
Date and time when the record was created.
Unique identifier of the delegate user who created the record.
Sequence number of the import that created this record.
Unique identifier of the user who modified the record.
Date and time when the record was modified.
Unique identifier of the delegate user who modified the record.
Unique identifier for the organization
Date and time that the record was migrated.
Sub-category within the account type. Optional.
Long-form description of the account.
Depth in the COA hierarchy: 0 = top-level, 1 = sub-account, etc. Maintained by plugin in a later phase.
Account number in the entitys numbering scheme. Unique within an entity (enforced by alternate key).
Short display name for reports and compact UI.
Classification: Asset / Liability / Equity / Revenue / Expense.
Unique identifier for entity instances
Primary name field.

ISO 4217 currency code. USD only in v1; column present so multi-currency can be added without a schema change. The default value 'USD' is set by seed scripts at insert time, not at the metadata layer (Dataverse string columns do not accept a metadata-level default).
Sort order for COA display in reports.
Legal entity that owns this account. An account number is unique within an entity.
Identifier from the source system during migration (e.g., the Macola account number).
Soft-delete flag. Inactive accounts cannot be posted to but are retained for financial-history preservation.
Soft-delete flag. Inactive accounts cannot be posted to but are retained for financial-history preservation.
Flags accounts representing physical cash or bank accounts. Drives reconciliation routing and dual-approval policy on JEs.
Flags accounts representing physical cash or bank accounts. Drives reconciliation routing and dual-approval policy on JEs.
Normal balance for this account (Debit or Credit). Optional override of the linked rm_accounttype.rm_normalbalance, stored locally for query efficiency.
Normal balance for this account (Debit or Credit). Optional override of the linked rm_accounttype.rm_normalbalance, stored locally for query efficiency.
Self-reference for hierarchical COA. NULL means top-level.
Status of the Chart of Account
Status of the Chart of Account
Reason for the status of the Chart of Account
Reason for the status of the Chart of Account
For internal use only.
Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.
